workContext.title: Split runtime liveness and discovery out of the repo-wide live summary onto per-runtime authoritative refs, and keep the summary runtime index as a derived aggregate instead of the hot heartbeat write path.
workContext.summary: Implement per-runtime authoritative runtime refs, move runtime heartbeats off the live summary hot path, keep the summary runtime index derived from runtime refs, and treat runtime-only authoritative refs as sufficient shared-coordination availability for peer-runtime routing.
workContext.planTitle: Implement shared coordination v1 architecture hardening

publishSummary.title: Split runtime liveness and discovery out of the repo-wide live summary onto per-runtime authoritative refs, and keep the summary runtime index as a derived aggregate instead of the hot heartbeat write path.
publishSummary.summary: Implement per-runtime authoritative runtime refs, move runtime heartbeats off the live summary hot path, keep the summary runtime index derived from runtime refs, and treat runtime-only authoritative refs as sufficient shared-coordination availability for peer-runtime routing.
